title: Complete the first-run onboarding and reach the dashboard
description: This verifies that a new store owner can complete onboarding, sign in, configure key store settings, and land on the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Complete the onboarding wizard with valid business setup details
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Set the locale and receipt configuration to valid values
Verify the selected localization and receipt settings are reflected in the interface

title: Complete a cash sale from product search to receipt
description: This verifies that a cashier can search for products, build a cart, take cash payment, and complete the sale with a receipt confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid cashier PIN
Open a new cash shift with valid opening cash
Search for a product by name or SKU
Add the product to the cart
Select cash as the payment method
Enter a valid cash tendered amount
Verify a receipt confirmation is displayed
Verify the completed transaction is reflected in the checkout session

title: Complete onboarding and reach the dashboard
description: A new store owner can finish onboarding, log in, set locale and VAT preferences, and arrive at the dashboard with the updated configuration applied.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Change the VAT or receipt settings
Verify the updated store settings are applied

title: Log in with email and password
description: An authenticated user can sign in with valid credentials and reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user session is active

title: Open a cashier shift before entering checkout
description: This verifies that a cashier can open a cash shift and access the POS checkout experience only after the shift is opened.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid cashier PIN
Open a new cash shift with valid opening cash
Verify the active checkout screen is displayed
Verify the cart and payment area are available

title: Open a cash shift from the shift opening screen
description: A cashier can enter opening cash details and begin a shift so POS checkout becomes available.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the opening cash amount

title: Log in with cashier PIN
description: A cashier can use the PIN login flow to access the app and reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid PIN
Verify the cashier session is active

title: Close a shift and review reconciliation details
description: This verifies that a cashier can close an open shift and see Z-report reconciliation details, including any discrepancy summary when present.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid cashier PIN
Open a new cash shift with valid opening cash
Navigate to the cash sessions page
Verify the shift close summary is displayed
Verify the Z-report reconciliation details are displayed

title: Close a cash shift and review reconciliation totals
description: A cashier or manager can close an active shift and see the Z-report totals and discrepancy summary.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the Z-report totals are displayed
Verify the discrepancy summary is displayed

title: Limit access to a branch-scoped area for unauthorized users
description: This verifies that a user without the needed branch or role access cannot view a restricted operational area and sees a permission-denied state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify an access denied message is displayed
Verify restricted administration content is not visible

title: Apply a manager-approved discount during checkout
description: This verifies that a cashier can apply a discount to a sale and complete it after manager authorization is accepted.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid cashier PIN
Open a new cash shift with valid opening cash
Search for a product by name or SKU
Add the product to the cart
Apply a discount to the cart
Enter a valid manager PIN when prompted
Verify a discount is applied to the cart total
Verify a receipt confirmation is displayed

title: Adjust inventory and review stock levels
description: This verifies that a manager can create a stock adjustment and then review the updated stock levels from inventory screens.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Create a valid stock adjustment with a reason code
Verify the updated stock level is displayed
Verify the stock movement is reflected in inventory history

title: Review branch stock levels and low-stock alerts
description: This test verifies that a manager can open inventory stock levels, review stock by branch, and see low-stock alerts in the stock overview.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify stock by branch is displayed

title: Switch the interface language
description: A signed-in user can switch between Arabic and English and see the interface update accordingly.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the interface updates to the selected language
Verify the layout remains usable after the language change

title: Accept an incoming order and advance it through preparation
description: This verifies that an operator can accept an incoming order and progress it through the workflow until it is ready or completed.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Advance the order status through preparation steps
Verify the order appears in an in-progress or ready state
Verify the accepted order remains visible in the workflow

title: Create a new product in the catalogue
description: This verifies that a manager can add a product with required details and see it appear in the product list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Enter valid product details including name, SKU, barcode, price, and category
Verify the new product appears in the catalogue
Verify the product list remains accessible

title: View a sales summary for a chosen period
description: This verifies that a user can open the sales summary report, choose a period, and see summary totals and trends.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify sales summary totals are displayed

title: Review daily financial summary and reconciliation
description: A manager or owner can open the daily summary and reconciliation pages to review totals and payment breakdowns for end-of-day review.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the daily revenue and expense summary is displayed
Verify the reconciliation totals are displayed

title: Create a stock transfer between branches
description: This verifies that a manager can move inventory between branches and see the transfer recorded in inventory history.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Create a valid transfer from one branch to another
Verify the transfer appears in the movement history
Verify the transfer details are displayed

title: Save store details during onboarding
description: A new store owner can enter core store details and keep progressing through setup without losing the information.

steps.description: Fill in the VAT registration number
Verify the store details step is accepted

title: Create a stock adjustment
description: This test verifies that a manager can create a stock adjustment with a quantity and reason code and see the resulting stock movement recorded.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a quantity value into the adjustment quantity field
Select a reason code for the adjustment
Verify a stock movement entry is displayed

title: Create a purchase order and receive goods
description: This verifies that a manager can create a purchase order and then receive goods into inventory from that order.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Create a purchase order with valid supplier and items
Receive goods for the created order
Verify the goods receipt is recorded
Verify received stock is reflected in inventory

title: Update layout direction and calendar preferences
description: A signed-in user can change RTL/LTR and calendar preferences, save them, and see the layout and date display update.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the layout direction is updated
Verify the date format uses the selected calendar

title: Hold and recall a cart before completing the sale
description: This verifies that a cashier can temporarily hold a cart, reopen it later in the same session, and complete the transaction successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid cashier PIN
Open a new cash shift with valid opening cash
Search for a product by name or SKU
Add the product to the cart
Verify the recalled cart contents are restored
Verify a receipt confirmation is displayed

title: Receive goods against an order
description: This test verifies that a manager can open a goods receipt, confirm received quantities, save it, and see stock updated in the inventory flow.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Save delivery platform credentials
description: This verifies that a user can enter platform credentials and keep the integration ready for sync.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Enter API credentials for a platform
Verify the platform is ready for sync

title: Fulfill an incoming Thawani order
description: A user can review Thawani orders in the unified order screen, accept an order, and advance it through fulfillment statuses.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the Thawani order is visible in the order list
Verify the order reaches a fulfillment status

title: Choose a business type during onboarding
description: A new store owner can select a business type and continue the onboarding flow successfully.

steps.description: Verify the onboarding wizard advances to the next step

title: Review sales summary and daily accounting results

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}

Verify the sales summary data is displayed

title: Review report options from the reports hub

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify analytics data sections are available

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated receipt configuration is shown

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search or filter the product list

title: Configure currency and timezone during onboarding

steps.description: Verify the localization settings are accepted

title: Create and send a purchase order

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add at least one item to the order
